brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid causal reasoning; Multi-level analysis tracing backdoor paths, Simpson's paradox, and why Method 2 would block confounding; Reasoning injection shows awareness of biases to suppress (correlation-causation leap); Verifies by contrasting Method 1 vs Method 2 and explaining why contradictory results arise; Acknowledges Method 2 is impossible in practice due to unobservability; Contrasts both methods as alternative approaches; Full derivation from DAG structure through backdoor path to conclusion is reproducible
